candidate_definitions.text: A collection of GICP-based fast point cloud registration algorithms
We released [small_gicp](https://github.com/koide3/small_gicp) that is twice as fast as fast_gicp and with minimum dependencies and clean interfaces.
Multi-threaded and SSE friendly NDT algorithm

This package provides an OpenMP-boosted Normal Distributions Transform (and GICP) algorithm derived from pcl. The NDT algorithm is modified to be SSE-friendly and multi-threaded. It can run up to 10 times faster than its original version in pcl.
Efficient and parallel algorithms for point cloud registration [C++, Python]

**small_gicp** is a header-only C++ library providing efficient and parallelized algorithms for fine point cloud registration (ICP, Point-to-Plane ICP, GICP, VGICP, etc.). It is a refined and optimized version of its predecessor, [fast_gicp](https://github.com/SMRT-AIST/fast_gic…
